name: Nam Prik for Raw Vegetables (Thai Spice)
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove the seeds from the chilies and chop them.
2. Pound or process the chilies with the dried shrimp until combined.
3. Heat the trassi, then crumble it and pound with the garlic.
4. Combine all ingredients except the lime juice.
5. Add the lime juice gradually, ensuring the sauce remains thick.
6. Store in the refrigerator.
